judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent's entity-resolution normalization (using re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9\s']+", " ", s)) stripped non-ASCII characters from titles/artists, collapsing many non-Latin entries into empty/identical entity_keys and over-aggregating revenues, which led it to incorrectly select “妥协” by 蔡依林 with $226,802.80 instead of the true top song.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent summed revenue by track_id and selected the max from sales (call_ctscmvPVZ2uw6FjCUoGKDde8), then looked up that single track_id in tracks (call_679fBU0FESeJo3W87SWmbTnX) without performing entity resolution to aggregate duplicate track_ids for the same song, leading to the wrong song being reported.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After aggregating sales and joining with tracks, the agent grouped by an entity_key built from exact-normalized title, artist, and album in execute_python (including album and relying on exact strings), which fragmented duplicates of the same song across different albums/variants and led it to incorrectly pick "Groovey" instead of the true top "Zo gaat het leven aan je voor".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing calls, the agent grouped sales by track_id and selected the single highest (call_cPMdichQAtyOdPG57FLcKQwW), then looked up that track’s metadata (call_tQiXaMkYHk3vlIANoDSRfgtO), failing to perform the required entity resolution to aggregate revenues across duplicate track_ids representing the same song, so the returned song does not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent’s entity resolution normalized titles/artists by removing all non a–z/0–9 characters, collapsing many non‑Latin entries to an empty key ("t:"), which incorrectly grouped numerous tracks into one entity and produced an inflated total (80,191.51) for a Greek track instead of the true top song.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
